content.en:
Ye Tian also came out of the Realm of Destruction, and when he came out, he also saw the Golden Ancient Demon that had just come out.

Rumble!!!!

The eyes of the two sides collided, but the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon retreated, quickly retreating.

He didn't have to continue to anger Ye Tian, and Ye Tian was too powerful, this time I was afraid that he had obtained a lot of resources from the Realm of Mortality, and his strength might improve quickly in the future.

At that time, he was afraid that he would not be Ye Tian's opponent at all.

Therefore, he didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian.

......

Golden God Department.

The Golden Extermination Ancient Demon came back, and the Realm Red Ancient Demon and the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon came over as soon as possible and asked the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon about attacking and killing Ye Tian.

"Lord Jin Slayer Ancient Demon, have you killed the Heavenly Ancient Demon?"

The Red Ancient Demon asked.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said helplessly: "It didn't work!"

"How could this be? Could it be that the Heavenly Ancient Demon hid after entering the Realm of Destruction, and you didn't find it?"

"Not really. Jin Annihilation Ancient Demon said: "I found him, fought with him, and was injured by him, and his injuries have not yet fully recovered." "

"How is this possible?"

The Red Ancient Demons couldn't believe it at all.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon is a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse was injured by a top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse who had just broken through, which was almost impossible!

"If you don't believe it, there's no way, that Heavenly Ancient Demon is too demonic, extremely terrifying in every way, and has mastered a crippled Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, I was injured by his Broken Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane. "Golden Destroying Ancient Demon Dao.

"Lord Jin Slayer Ancient Demon, what should I do? That guy didn't fall, we offended him again, and when he broke through to the peak Ancient Demon level realm, then the Golden God Department would be completely finished!" Several other Ancient Demon level powerhouses panicked.

"What's the panic, when he breaks through to the peak ancient demon level, it will be countless years later, don't worry about it now. Moreover, as long as we don't enter some special places, with the order of the main department of the Luo Mother, the ancient demon-level powerhouses are not allowed to kill each other, and he will not dare to kill us. At most, suppress the Golden God Department and kill some emperors~. "Golden Destroying Ancient Demon Dao.

"That's right, the order of the main department of the Luo Mother, the ancient demon-level powerhouse is not allowed to kill each other, he doesn't dare to kill us!

They breathed a sigh of relief at the thought of loving you.

Unless Ye Tian broke through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon, he would be able to kill them without being sanctioned by the Luo Mother Lord.

But the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who is not the main department of the Luo mother has no chance of breaking through to the ultimate ancient demon, no matter how demonic it is.

......

Ye Tian didn't think about taking revenge on the Golden God Ministry, he just wanted to improve his strength now.

After returning to the Eagle Ministry, Ye Tian was ready to use the Nightmare Rama Flower to improve the Ultimate Rule Realm, striving to directly comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm to the consummation realm on this day.

If it can be done, it will save countless years of penance.

I saw that Ye Tian directly refined the Nightmare Rama Flower, instantly improving his comprehension infinitely, and then let the duplicate bodies use various top-notch ultimate ancient treasures such as analysis to analyze and comprehend, and accelerate the comprehension of the ultimate rule realm.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's Ultimate Rule Realm was rapidly improving, and his comprehension speed far surpassed before.

Finally.

Ye Tian's Ultimate Rule Realm had successfully comprehended the Perfection Realm before the Nightmare Rama Flower was exhausted.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and if he encountered the Golden Extermination Ancient Demon again, he would be able to easily suppress the Golden Exterminating Ancient Demon.

Subsequently, Ye Tian lifted this body, after all, after refining the Nightmare Rama Flower, this body was also scrapped, and it was useless.

However, his perception of the realm of ultimate rules was still a state of perfection.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian put his cultivation on improving his cultivation and cultivating several form secret methods, and several of his form secret methods were still in the fourth form consummation realm, and he had not yet cultivated to the fifth form.

If he cultivated to the fifth form, his strength would skyrocket.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian was cultivating in the Eagle Department, and his strength was also improving little by little.

Since he had obtained a lot of resources, there was no need to worry much about improving his cultivation, and he had also taken out some resources to trade with other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses.

For example, in the Grass of Destruction, several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses were buying it, and Ye Tian traded this thing to them in exchange for some resources.

Of course, he also wanted to buy the Nightmare Rama Flower, but so far no peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse had traded with him.

It's right to think about it, no matter how big the side effects of the Nightmare Rama Flower are, it can cut off its potential, but if it is given to a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse who has no hope of breaking through to the peak Ancient Demon-level realm, let him refine, there is a high probability that he will be able to break through to the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

In that case, there will be one more peak ancient demon-level combat power!

Whether it's the main department of the Arrow Mother, or those top tribes, they all yearn for one more peak ancient demon-level combat power!

Previously, the main department of the mother of Ah Luo was willing to take out the Nightmare Rama flower as a reward, and it was also to encourage those ancient demon-level powerhouses to work hard for the main department of the mother of Luo, but it was not benevolent.

Therefore, there is a high probability that Ye Tian will not be able to trade the Nightmare Rama Flower he needs, otherwise he can quickly increase his strength many times in a short period of time!

"'Without the Nightmare Rama Flower, I'll just cultivate slowly, at least there won't be any bottlenecks for now. "

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Arrow's main department.

Located in the depths of a majestic palace.

The Ancient Demon has reached a critical juncture.

At this time, several ultimate ancient demons such as Aroye and the Stygian Ancient Demon of the Arrow Mother's main department were discussing the matter of the Stygian Ancient Demon.

(King Li) "The girl of the Stygian Ancient Demon doesn't know if she can break through to the ultimate Ancient Demon realm this time, once she fails to break through, it will inevitably fall, and even we can't stop it." "

"I hope she can break through successfully, in this way, we will have one more Ultimate Ancient Demon, and the strength of our Luo Mother will be even stronger!"

And suddenly, the heavens and the earth shook, and the endless space-time line began to shrink here, which was a sign of the breakthrough of the ancient demons.

Boom !! even!

Billions of endless space-time lines connected to the ancient demons, and then the endless space-time lines shattered, and he transcended the space-time bubble and was no longer affected by the space-time bubble.

This is the real freedom!

Immediately afterward, the infinite energy was absorbed by the Stygian Ancient Demon to help her complete the final breakthrough.

"Hahaha, the Stygian Ancient Demon has broken through, and I've added another Ultimate Ancient Demon to my Arrow Mother's main department!"

The Ancient Demon of the Underworld was very excited.
